description:
Young M.A 'Off the Yak' album out now. Click here to stream at all retailers: https://www.smarturl.it/off_the_yak
Track produced by Mike Zombie.
Music video directed by JLShotThat.
Text me at (718) 808-6312.
Click here for official Young M.A merchandise: https://www.shopyoungma.com/store/​​ 
#YoungMA #HelloBaby #FivioForeign
